tool_summary: Lists files and directories in a specified directory.
platform_notes: The 'dir' command is an internal command of the Windows Command Prompt (cmd.exe). It provides similar functionality to the POSIX 'ls' utility but uses different flag syntax (/ instead of -) and behaves according to Windows filesystem attribute rules.

rules.description: The /S flag performs a recursive search through the specified directory and all its subdirectories.
